concerns.text: Constitution Principle VII requires validated features stored in `data/validated_features/` but plan.md outputs validation_report.csv to `data/derived/`. This violates the constitution's SSoT designation for validated artifacts.

Only agency_score.schema.yaml exists in contracts/ but plan produces 5 entity types (ConversationSession, UserEngagement, Demographics, RegressionResult, ValidationReport). Missing contracts for UserEngagement, Demographics, RegressionResult, ValidationReport outputs.
UserEngagement entity defines `observation_weeks` attribute but plan.md and quickstart.md do not show where this value is computed or stored. Data model attribute has no plan step exercising it.

Constitution Principle VI requires consent documentation links retained for ethical compliance but plan.md only mentions 'De-identified data under `data/`' without showing where consent links are stored or referenced.
Contract includes `utterance_count` and `processing_timestamp` fields but data-model.md's ConversationSession entity does not define these attributes. Contract schema has fields not in data model.
